{{Short description|Shinto shrine}} {{Use dmy dates|date=November 2019}} {{Infobox religious building | name = {{nihongo|'''Ubagami Daijingū'''|姥神大神宮}} | image = Ubagami Shrine 090206.jpg | caption = Ubagami Daijingū | map_type = Japan | map_alt = | coordinates = {{coord|41|51|59.2|N|140|7|30.1|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=title,inline}} | map_relief = | map_size = | map_caption = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | type = | deity = | founded_by = | established = | date_destroyed = | location = [[Esashi, Hokkaidō (Hiyama)|Esashi]], [[Hokkaidō]], [[Japan]]. | website = | architecture_style = | festival = | leadership = }} {{nihongo|'''Ubagami Daijingū'''|姥神大神宮}} is a [[Shinto shrine]] in [[Esashi, Hokkaidō (Hiyama)|Esashi]], [[Hokkaidō]], [[Japan]]. Its foundation date is uncertain but its existence is documented from the [[Edo period]].<ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.hokkaidojinjacho.jp/data/03/03001.html |title=Ubagami Daijingū |publisher=Hokkaidō Jinja-chō |accessdate=22 April 2011}}</ref> It is considered the oldest Shinto Shrine in Hokkaido.<ref>{{Cite web |title=Ubagamidaijingu Shrine |url=https://en.esashi.town/tourism/page.php?id=82 |access-date=2023-04-21 |website=Portal site for Tourist information of Hokkaido Esashi Town |language=en}}</ref> The Ubagami Daijingū Togyosai, when [[Float (parade)|floats]] decked out with lanterns are paraded through the town, is celebrated in August.<ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.hokkaido-esashi.jp/ubagami/index.htm |title=Ubagami Daijingū |publisher=[[Esashi, Hokkaidō (Hiyama)|Esashi Town]] |accessdate=22 April 2011 |url-status=dead |archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20110712005903/http://www.hokkaido-esashi.jp/ubagami/index.htm |archivedate=12 July 2011 }}</ref>
==References== {{Reflist}}
==See also== * [[Matsuri]] * [[List of Shinto shrines in Japan#Hokkaid.C5.8D|List of Shinto shrines in Hokkaidō]]
{{Shinto shrine}} [[Category:Pages that used to use Authority control]][[en:Ubagami Daijingū]]

Its foundation date is uncertain but its existence is documented from the [[Edo period]].<ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.hokkaidojinjacho.jp/data/03/03001.html |title=Ubagami Daijingū |publisher=Hokkaidō Jinja-chō |accessdate=22 April 2011}}</ref> It is considered the oldest Shinto Shrine in Hokkaido.<ref>{{Cite web |title=Ubagamidaijingu Shrine |url=https://en.esashi.town/tourism/page.php?id=82 |access-date=2023-04-21 |website=Portal site for Tourist information of Hokkaido Esashi Town |language=en}}</ref> The Ubagami Daijingū Togyosai, when [[Float (parade)|floats]] decked out with lanterns are paraded through the town, is celebrated in August.<ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.hokkaido-esashi.jp/ubagami/index.htm |title=Ubagami Daijingū |publisher=[[Esashi, Hokkaidō (Hiyama)|Esashi Town]] |accessdate=22 April 2011 |url-status=dead |archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20110712005903/http://www.hokkaido-esashi.jp/ubagami/index.htm |archivedate=12 July 2011 }}</ref>

revision.text:
{{Short description|Shinto shrine}} {{Use dmy dates|date=November 2019}} {{Infobox religious building | name = {{nihongo|'''Ubagami Daijingū'''|姥神大神宮}} | image = Ubagami Shrine 090206.jpg | caption = Ubagami Daijingū | map_type = Japan | map_alt = | coordinates = {{coord|41|51|59.2|N|140|7|30.1|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=title,inline}} | map_relief = | map_size = | map_caption = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | type = | deity = | founded_by = | established = | date_destroyed = | location = [[Esashi, Hokkaidō (Hiyama)|Esashi]], [[Hokkaidō]], [[Japan]]. | website = | architecture_style = | festival = | leadership = }} {{nihongo|'''Ubagami Daijingū'''|姥神大神宮}} is a [[Shinto shrine]] in [[Esashi, Hokkaidō (Hiyama)|Esashi]], [[Hokkaidō]], [[Japan]]. Its foundation date is uncertain but its existence is documented from the [[Edo period]].<ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.hokkaidojinjacho.jp/data/03/03001.html |title=Ubagami Daijingū |publisher=Hokkaidō Jinja-chō |accessdate=22 April 2011}}</ref> It is considered the oldest Shinto Shrine in Hokkaido.<ref>{{Cite web |title=Ubagamidaijingu Shrine |url=https://en.esashi.town/tourism/page.php?id=82 |access-date=2023-04-21 |website=Portal site for Tourist information of Hokkaido Esashi Town |language=en}}</ref> The Ubagami Daijingū Togyosai, when [[Float (parade)|floats]] decked out with lanterns are paraded through the town, is celebrated in August.<ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.hokkaido-esashi.jp/ubagami/index.htm |title=Ubagami Daijingū |publisher=[[Esashi, Hokkaidō (Hiyama)|Esashi Town]] |accessdate=22 April 2011 |url-status=dead |archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20110712005903/http://www.hokkaido-esashi.jp/ubagami/index.htm |archivedate=12 July 2011 }}</ref>
==References== {{Reflist}}
==See also== * [[Matsuri]] * [[List of Shinto shrines in Japan#Hokkaid.C5.8D|List of Shinto shrines in Hokkaidō]]

revision.text:
{{Short description|Shinto shrine}} {{Use dmy dates|date=November 2019}} {{Infobox religious building | name = {{nihongo|'''Ubagami Daijingū'''|姥神大神宮}} | image = Ubagami Shrine 090206.jpg | caption = Ubagami Daijingū | map_type = Japan | map_alt = | coordinates = {{coord|41|51|59.2|N|140|7|30.1|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=title,inline}} | map_relief = | map_size = | map_caption = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | type = | deity = | founded_by = | established = | date_destroyed = | location = [[Esashi, Hokkaidō (Hiyama)|Esashi]], [[Hokkaidō]], [[Japan]]. | website = | architecture_style = | festival = | leadership = }} {{nihongo|'''Ubagami Daijingū'''|姥神大神宮}} is a [[Shinto shrine]] in [[Esashi, Hokkaidō (Hiyama)|Esashi]], [[Hokkaidō]], [[Japan]]. Its foundation date is uncertain but its existence is documented from the [[Edo period]].<ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.hokkaidojinjacho.jp/data/03/03001.html |title=Ubagami Daijingū |publisher=Hokkaidō Jinja-chō |accessdate=22 April 2011}}</ref> It is considered the oldest Shinto Shrine in Hokkaido.<ref>{{Cite web |title=Ubagamidaijingu Shrine |url=https://en.esashi.town/tourism/page.php?id=82 |access-date=2023-04-21 |website=Portal site for Tourist information of Hokkaido Esashi Town |language=en}}</ref> The Ubagami Daijingū Togyosai, when [[Float (parade)|floats]] decked out with lanterns are paraded through the town, is celebrated in August.<ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.hokkaido-esashi.jp/ubagami/index.htm |title=Ubagami Daijingū |publisher=[[Esashi, Hokkaidō (Hiyama)|Esashi Town]] |accessdate=22 April 2011 |url-status=dead |archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20110712005903/http://www.hokkaido-esashi.jp/ubagami/index.htm |archivedate=12 July 2011 }}</ref>
==References== {{Reflist}}
==See also== * [[Matsuri]] * [[List of Shinto shrines in Japan#Hokkaid.C5.8D|List of Shinto shrines in Hokkaidō]]

{{Short description|Shinto shrine}} {{Use dmy dates|date=November 2019}} {{Infobox religious building | name = {{nihongo|'''Ubagami Daijingū'''|姥神大神宮}} | image = Ubagami Shrine 090206.jpg | caption = Ubagami Daijingū | map_type = Japan | map_alt = | coordinates = {{coord|41|51|59.2|N|140|7|30.1|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=title,inline}} | map_relief = | map_size = | map_caption = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | type = | deity = | founded_by = | established = | date_destroyed = | location = [[Esashi, Hokkaidō (Hiyama)|Esashi]], [[Hokkaidō]], [[Japan]]. | website = | architecture_style = | festival = | leadership = }} {{nihongo|'''Ubagami Daijingū'''|姥神大神宮}} is a [[Shinto shrine]] in [[Esashi, Hokkaidō (Hiyama)|Esashi]], [[Hokkaidō]], [[Japan]]. Its foundation date is uncertain but its existence is documented from the [[Edo period]].<ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.hokkaidojinjacho.jp/data/03/03001.html |title=Ubagami Daijingū |publisher=Hokkaidō Jinja-chō |accessdate=22 April 2011}}</ref> It is considered the oldest Shinto Shrine in Hokkaido.<ref>{{Cite web |title=Ubagamidaijingu Shrine |url=https://en.esashi.town/tourism/page.php?id=82 |access-date=2023-04-21 |website=Portal site for Tourist information of Hokkaido Esashi Town |language=en}}</ref> The Ubagami Daijingū Togyosai, when [[Float (parade)|floats]] decked out with lanterns are paraded through the town, is celebrated in August.<ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.hokkaido-esashi.jp/ubagami/index.htm |title=Ubagami Daijingū |publisher=[[Esashi, Hokkaidō (Hiyama)|Esashi Town]] |accessdate=22 April 2011 |url-status=dead |archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20110712005903/http://www.hokkaido-esashi.jp/ubagami/index.htm |archivedate=12 July 2011 }}</ref>
==References== {{Reflist}}
==See also== * [[Matsuri]] * [[List of Shinto shrines in Japan#Hokkaid.C5.8D|List of Shinto shrines in Hokkaidō]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[sn:commons:Category:Ubagami Daijin-gū]][[en:Ubagami Daijingū]][[fr:Ubagami Daijin-gū]][[ja:姥神大神宮]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q3547609]] Wikidata name: Ubagami Daijin-gū shrine [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:12, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Short description|Shinto shrine}} {{Use dmy dates|date=November 2019}} {{Infobox religious building | name = {{nihongo|'''Ubagami Daijingū'''|姥神大神宮}} | image = Ubagami Shrine 090206.jpg | caption = Ubagami Daijingū | map_type = Japan | map_alt = | coordinates = {{coord|41|51|59.2|N|140|7|30.1|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=title,inline}} | map_relief = | map_size = | map_caption = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | type = | deity = | founded_by = | established = | date_destroyed = | location = [[:en:Esashi, Hokkaidō (Hiyama)|Esashi]], [[:en:Hokkaidō|Hokkaidō]], [[:en:Japan|Japan]]. | website = | architecture_style = | festival = | leadership = }} {{nihongo|'''Ubagami Daijingū'''|姥神大神宮}} is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] in [[:en:Esashi, Hokkaidō (Hiyama)|Esashi]], [[:en:Hokkaidō|Hokkaidō]], [[:en:Japan|Japan]]. Its foundation date is uncertain but its existence is documented from the [[:en:Edo period|Edo period]].<ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.hokkaidojinjacho.jp/data/03/03001.html |title=Ubagami Daijingū |publisher=Hokkaidō Jinja-chō |accessdate=22 April 2011}}</ref> It is considered the oldest Shinto Shrine in Hokkaido.<ref>{{Cite web |title=Ubagamidaijingu Shrine |url=https://en.esashi.town/tourism/page.php?id=82 |access-date=2023-04-21 |website=Portal site for Tourist information of Hokkaido Esashi Town |language=en}}</ref> The Ubagami Daijingū Togyosai, when [[:en:Float (parade)|floats]] decked out with lanterns are paraded through the town, is celebrated in August.<ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.hokkaido-esashi.jp/ubagami/index.htm |title=Ubagami Daijingū |publisher=[[:en:Esashi, Hokkaidō (Hiyama)|Esashi Town]] |accessdate=22 April 2011 |url-status=dead |archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20110712005903/http://www.hokkaido-esashi.jp/ubagami/index.htm |archivedate=12 July 2011 }}</ref>

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[sn:commons:Category:Ubagami Daijin-gū]][[en:Ubagami Daijingū]][[fr:Ubagami Daijin-gū]][[ja:姥神大神宮]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q3547609]] Wikidata name: Ubagami Daijin-gū shrine [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:12, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Short description|Shinto shrine}} {{Use dmy dates|date=November 2019}} {{Infobox religious building | name = {{nihongo|'''Ubagami Daijingū'''|姥神大神宮}} | image = Ubagami Shrine 090206.jpg | caption = Ubagami Daijingū | map_type = Japan | map_alt = | coordinates = {{coord|41|51|59.2|N|140|7|30.1|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=title,inline}} | map_relief = | map_size = | map_caption = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | type = | deity = | founded_by = | established = | date_destroyed = | location = [[:en:Esashi, Hokkaidō (Hiyama)|Esashi]], [[:en:Hokkaidō|Hokkaidō]], [[:en:Japan|Japan]]. | website = | architecture_style = | festival = | leadership = }} {{nihongo|'''Ubagami Daijingū'''|姥神大神宮}} is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] in [[:en:Esashi, Hokkaidō (Hiyama)|Esashi]], [[:en:Hokkaidō|Hokkaidō]], [[:en:Japan|Japan]]. Its foundation date is uncertain but its existence is documented from the [[:en:Edo period|Edo period]].<ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.hokkaidojinjacho.jp/data/03/03001.html |title=Ubagami Daijingū |publisher=Hokkaidō Jinja-chō |accessdate=22 April 2011}}</ref> It is considered the oldest Shinto Shrine in Hokkaido.<ref>{{Cite web |title=Ubagamidaijingu Shrine |url=https://en.esashi.town/tourism/page.php?id=82 |access-date=2023-04-21 |website=Portal site for Tourist information of Hokkaido Esashi Town |language=en}}</ref> The Ubagami Daijingū Togyosai, when [[:en:Float (parade)|floats]] decked out with lanterns are paraded through the town, is celebrated in August.<ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.hokkaido-esashi.jp/ubagami/index.htm |title=Ubagami Daijingū |publisher=[[:en:Esashi, Hokkaidō (Hiyama)|Esashi Town]] |accessdate=22 April 2011 |url-status=dead |archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20110712005903/http://www.hokkaido-esashi.jp/ubagami/index.htm |archivedate=12 July 2011 }}</ref>
==References== {{Reflist}}
==See also== * [[Japanese festivals|Matsuri]] * [[List of Shinto shrines in Japan#Hokkaid.C5.8D|List of Shinto shrines in Hokkaidō]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵↵↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[commons:Category:Ubagami Daijin-gū]][[en:Ubagami Daijingū]][[fr:Ubagami Daijin-gū]][[ja:姥神大神宮]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[commons:Category:Ubagami Daijin-gū]][[en:Ubagami Daijingū]][[fr:Ubagami Daijin-gū]][[ja:姥神大神宮]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[sn:commons:Category:Ubagami Daijin-gū]][[en:Ubagami Daijingū]][[fr:Ubagami Daijin-gū]][[ja:姥神大神宮]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q3547609]] Wikidata name: Ubagami Daijin-gū shrine [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:12, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Short description|Shinto shrine}} {{Use dmy dates|date=November 2019}} {{Infobox religious building | name = {{nihongo|'''Ubagami Daijingū'''|姥神大神宮}} | image = Ubagami Shrine 090206.jpg | caption = Ubagami Daijingū | map_type = Japan | map_alt = | coordinates = {{coord|41|51|59.2|N|140|7|30.1|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=title,inline}} | map_relief = | map_size = | map_caption = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | type = | deity = | founded_by = | established = | date_destroyed = | location = [[:en:Esashi, Hokkaidō (Hiyama)|Esashi]], [[:en:Hokkaidō|Hokkaidō]], [[:en:Japan|Japan]]. | website = | architecture_style = | festival = | leadership = }} {{nihongo|'''Ubagami Daijingū'''|姥神大神宮}} is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] in [[:en:Esashi, Hokkaidō (Hiyama)|Esashi]], [[:en:Hokkaidō|Hokkaidō]], [[:en:Japan|Japan]]. Its foundation date is uncertain but its existence is documented from the [[:en:Edo period|Edo period]].<ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.hokkaidojinjacho.jp/data/03/03001.html |title=Ubagami Daijingū |publisher=Hokkaidō Jinja-chō |accessdate=22 April 2011}}</ref> It is considered the oldest Shinto Shrine in Hokkaido.<ref>{{Cite web |title=Ubagamidaijingu Shrine |url=https://en.esashi.town/tourism/page.php?id=82 |access-date=2023-04-21 |website=Portal site for Tourist information of Hokkaido Esashi Town |language=en}}</ref> The Ubagami Daijingū Togyosai, when [[:en:Float (parade)|floats]] decked out with lanterns are paraded through the town, is celebrated in August.<ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.hokkaido-esashi.jp/ubagami/index.htm |title=Ubagami Daijingū |publisher=[[:en:Esashi, Hokkaidō (Hiyama)|Esashi Town]] |accessdate=22 April 2011 |url-status=dead |archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20110712005903/http://www.hokkaido-esashi.jp/ubagami/index.htm |archivedate=12 July 2011 }}</ref>
==References== {{Reflist}}
==See also== * [[Japanese festivals|Matsuri]] * [[List of Shinto shrines in Japan#Hokkaid.C5.8D|List of Shinto shrines in Hokkaidō]]

Its foundation date is uncertain but its existence is documented from the {{ill|Edo period|en|Edo period|WD=Q184963|lt=Edo period}}.<ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.hokkaidojinjacho.jp/data/03/03001.html |title=Ubagami Daijingū |publisher=Hokkaidō Jinja-chō |accessdate=22 April 2011}}</ref> It is considered the oldest Shinto Shrine in Hokkaido.<ref>{{Cite web |title=Ubagamidaijingu Shrine |url=https://en.esashi.town/tourism/page.php?id=82 |access-date=2023-04-21 |website=Portal site for Tourist information of Hokkaido Esashi Town |language=en}}</ref> The Ubagami Daijingū Togyosai, when {{ill|Float (parade)|en|Float (parade)|WD=Q2529255|lt=floats}} decked out with lanterns are paraded through the town, is celebrated in August.<ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.hokkaido-esashi.jp/ubagami/index.htm |title=Ubagami Daijingū |publisher=[[:en:Esashi, Hokkaidō (Hiyama)|Esashi Town]] |accessdate=22 April 2011 |url-status=dead |archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20110712005903/http://www.hokkaido-esashi.jp/ubagami/index.htm |archivedate=12 July 2011 }}</ref>
==References== {{Reflist}}
==See also== * [[Japanese festivals|Matsuri]] * [[List of Shinto shrines in Japan#Hokkaid.C5.8D|List of Shinto shrines in Hokkaidō]]

{{Short description|Shinto shrine}} {{Use dmy dates|date=November 2019}} {{Infobox religious building | name = {{nihongo|'''Ubagami Daijingū'''|姥神大神宮}} | image = Ubagami Shrine 090206.jpg | caption = Ubagami Daijingū | map_type = Japan | map_alt = | coordinates = {{coord|41|51|59.2|N|140|7|30.1|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=title,inline}} | map_relief = | map_size = | map_caption = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | type = | deity = | founded_by = | established = | date_destroyed = | location = [[:en:Esashi, Hokkaidō (Hiyama)|Esashi]], [[:en:Hokkaidō|Hokkaidō]], {{ill|Japan|en|Japan|WD=Q17|lt=Japan|1=Japan}}. | website = | architecture_style = | festival = | leadership = }} {{nihongo|'''Ubagami Daijingū'''|姥神大神宮}} is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} in [[:en:Esashi, Hokkaidō (Hiyama)|Esashi]], [[:en:Hokkaidō|Hokkaidō]], {{ill|Japan|en|Japan|WD=Q17|lt=Japan|1=Japan}}. Its foundation date is uncertain but its existence is documented from the {{ill|Edo period|en|Edo period|WD=Q184963|lt=Edo period|1=Edo period}}.<ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.hokkaidojinjacho.jp/data/03/03001.html |title=Ubagami Daijingū |publisher=Hokkaidō Jinja-chō |accessdate=22 April 2011}}</ref> It is considered the oldest Shinto Shrine in Hokkaido.<ref>{{Cite web |title=Ubagamidaijingu Shrine |url=https://en.esashi.town/tourism/page.php?id=82 |access-date=2023-04-21 |website=Portal site for Tourist information of Hokkaido Esashi Town |language=en}}</ref> The Ubagami Daijingū Togyosai, when {{ill|Float (parade)|en|Float (parade)|WD=Q2529255|lt=floats|1=Float (parade)}} decked out with lanterns are paraded through the town, is celebrated in August.<ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.hokkaido-esashi.jp/ubagami/index.htm |title=Ubagami Daijingū |publisher=[[:en:Esashi, Hokkaidō (Hiyama)|Esashi Town]] |accessdate=22 April 2011 |url-status=dead |archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20110712005903/http://www.hokkaido-esashi.jp/ubagami/index.htm |archivedate=12 July 2011 }}</ref>
==References== {{Reflist}}
==See also== * [[Japanese festivals|Matsuri]] * [[List of Shinto shrines in Japan#Hokkaid.C5.8D|List of Shinto shrines in Hokkaidō]]
